name: HELA
description: As the Goddess of Death, Hela wields supreme control over the fallen souls residing in Hel. With a haunting whisper and a murder of crows, the queen of the underworld gracefully reaps the souls of her enemies without an ounce of mercy.
lore: The Asgardian Goddess of Death, Hela is a powerful sorceress who controls an endless army of undead warriors. She has long sought to expand her domain beyond the nether realms and will make any deal that benefits her goal. Hela will not rest until all souls—living and dead—are hers to command. Hela offered to support Loki's coup in exchange for an extension of Hel's territory into the realm of the living. In truth, though, she seeks to claim Yggsgard's throne—and the temporal power that comes with it—for herself.

stats.Damage Falloff: Falloff begins at 18m, decreasing to 75% at 35m

abilities.name: Goddess of Death
abilities.description: Soar into the sky and unleash Nastrond Crows from each hand at will

stats.Casting: Straight-line projectile that generates a spell field upon impact

abilities.name: Astral Flock
abilities.description: Transform into a Nastrond Crow to glide forth, press again to undo the transformation. Gain Bonus Health when the transformation ends

stats.Special Effect: Shapeshift into a Nastrond Crow and gain invincibility

abilities.name: Soul Drainer
abilities.description: Project an explosive Hel sphere to Stun nearby enemies.

stats.Casting: Arced projectile that generates a spell field upon impact

abilities.name: Piercing Night
abilities.description: Fire multiple Nightsword thorns that detonate after a delay

stats.Casting: Straight-line projectile that generates a spell field upon impact
stats.Special Effect: Projectiles stick to enemies on hit

abilities.name: Nastrond Crowstorm
abilities.description: Defeating an enemy will generate a Nastrond Crow, exploding after a duration

received.name: Hel Tendrils
received.description: Venom shares his symbiotes with Jeff and Hela. Hela's Hel Tendrils unleash a symbiotic Hel Sphere. Upon hit, it pulls nearby enemies toward the impact point and links them, slowing enemies that try to escape.

stats.Slow Effect: Slow the enemies by 20% at the center, increasing to 40% at 2.5m from the center.

received.name: DEATH KNELL
received.description: Hela channels energy of the undead to empower Namor. When Namor strikes with his trident, a spectral water column erupts at the target area, slowing enemies hit. Whenever Hela or Namor assist in a KO, an invulnerable Undead Monstro spawns at the fallen enemy's position, automatically attacking the nearest foe for a short time before vanishing

stats.Damage Falloff: Falloff begins at 20m, decreasing to 50% at 40m

base.description: Replace Soul Drainer with Hel Tendrils. Upon hit, tendrils pull nearby enemies toward the impact point and links them, Slowingenemies that try to escape.

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Venom, Piercing Night fires a dense volley of symbiote-infused Nightsword Thorns. Each direct Nightsword Thorn hit restores a portion of Hela's Health

base.description: Whenever Hela participates in a KO, an Undead Monstro spawns at the fallen enemy's position. While an Undead Monstro is present, casting Piercing Night will command the Monstro to spit a Nightsword Thorn at the nearest enemy.

stats.Damage Falloff: Falloff begins at 20m, decreasing to 50% at 40m

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Namor, each attack during Goddess of Death spawns an Undead Monstro at the point of impact.

stats.Special Effect: Each attack during Goddess of Death spawns an Undead Monstro at the point of impact.
